headline: These Dividend Stocks Pay More Than 10-Year Treasury Bonds
summary: Government bonds can provide steady income, but they might leave you with the nagging feeling that you can do better. After all, some dividend stocks not only provide a better yield than government bonds, but they also offer share-price appreciation. Right not, the annual interest rate on a 10-year U.S. Treasury bond is around 4%. ... These Dividend Stocks Pay More Than 10-Year Treasury Bonds
